name: Grid
summary: Class that references a Document's grid settings.

methods.name: clip_to_margins?
methods.summary: The #clip_to_margins? method returns whether or not the grid is clipped to the page margins.
methods.remarks: The #clip_to_margins? method returns whether or not the grid is clipped to the page margins.

methods.name: in_front?
methods.summary: The #in_front? method returns whether or not the grid is drawn on top of entities.
methods.remarks: The #in_front? method returns whether or not the grid is drawn on top of entities.

methods.name: print?
methods.summary: The #print? method returns whether or not the Layout::Grid is printed.
methods.remarks: The #print? method returns whether or not the Layout::Grid is printed.

methods.name: show?
methods.summary: The #show? method returns whether or not the Layout::Grid is visible.
methods.remarks: The #show? method returns whether or not the Layout::Grid is visible.

methods.name: show_major?
methods.summary: The #show_major? method returns whether or not the major grid lines are visible.
methods.remarks: The #show_major? method returns whether or not the major grid lines are visible.

methods.name: show_minor?
methods.summary: The #show_minor? method returns whether or not the minor grid lines are visible.
methods.remarks: The #show_minor? method returns whether or not the minor grid lines are visible.

properties.name: clip_to_margins
properties.summary: The #clip_to_margins= method sets whether or not the grid is clipped to the page margins.
properties.remarks: The #clip_to_margins= method sets whether or not the grid is clipped to the page margins.

properties.name: in_front
properties.summary: The #in_front= method sets whether or not the grid is drawn on top of entities.
properties.remarks: The #in_front= method sets whether or not the grid is drawn on top of entities.

properties.name: major_color
properties.summary: The #major_color method returns the Sketchup::Color for the major grid lines.
properties.remarks: The #major_color method returns the Sketchup::Color for the major grid lines.

properties.name: major_spacing
properties.summary: The #major_spacing method returns the major space size of the Layout::Grid.
properties.remarks: The #major_spacing method returns the major space size of the Layout::Grid.

properties.name: minor_color
properties.summary: The #minor_color method returns the Sketchup::Color for the minor grid lines.
properties.remarks: The #minor_color method returns the Sketchup::Color for the minor grid lines.

properties.name: minor_divisions
properties.summary: The #minor_divisions method returns the number of minor divisions of the Layout::Grid.
properties.remarks: The #minor_divisions method returns the number of minor divisions of the Layout::Grid.

properties.name: print
properties.summary: The #print= method sets whether or not the Layout::Grid is printed.
properties.remarks: The #print= method sets whether or not the Layout::Grid is printed.

properties.name: show
properties.summary: The #show= method sets whether or not the Layout::Grid is visible.
properties.remarks: The #show= method sets whether or not the Layout::Grid is visible.

properties.name: show_major
properties.summary: The #show_major= method sets whether or not the major grid lines are visible.
properties.remarks: The #show_major= method sets whether or not the major grid lines are visible.

properties.name: show_minor
properties.summary: The #show_minor= method sets whether or not the minor grid lines are visible.
properties.remarks: The #show_minor= method sets whether or not the minor grid lines are visible.
